inlineContent.text: Transform speech into perfectly polished text with AI. Completely free, endlessly flexible, and private by design.

abstract.text: Dictate Anywhere You Type
Service for AI text enhancement using Apple’s on-device Foundation Models.

as the macOS app so items sync via iCloud Keychain.

Requests are throttled based on launch count, days since install, and time since last request.
